name: Balanced Search Trees (Rotations)
description: Self-balancing search trees keep operations at O(log n) by restoring a balance invariant after each insertion: a standard BST insert is followed by checking the height or color invariant, and when it is violated, single or double rotations and recoloring are applied up the path until the tree property is restored.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Insert key into BST"]
    N2["Standard BST insert"]
    N3["Update height / color"]
    N4{"Balance violated?"}
    N5["Detect rotation case"]
    N6{"Single or double?"}
    N7["Single rotation"]
    N8["Double rotation"]
    N9["Recolor / fix up"]
    N10["Rebalance ancestors"]
    N11{"Property restored?"}
    N12["Balanced tree O(log n)"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|no| N12
    N4 -->|yes| N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 -->|single| N7
    N6 -->|double| N8
    N7 --> N9
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|no| N5
    N11 -->|yes| N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: A dichromatic framework for balanced trees
sources.journal: 19th Annual Symposium on Foundations of Computer Science

sources.title: Introduction to Algorithms (4th ed.)
sources.authors: Cormen, T. H.; Leiserson, C. E.; Rivest, R. L.; Stein, C.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
